finding: The deployment workflow can now distinguish missing, placeholder, malformed-account, and implausibly-short credential configuration states without recording either secret value.

verification.runtime: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed logic

limits: Configuration-shape readiness is not authentication proof.
A plausible token can still be expired, revoked, under-scoped, or attached to the wrong account.
No Cloudflare hostname or served response was verified in this run.
falsification_route: Run the workflow with configured environment secrets. The readiness gate must pass without exposing values; Cloudflare must then accept the credentials, return a deployment URL, and the served-identity verifier must match the committed surface.
